title: The Changing Room
company: brings this vibrant, funny, and touching play to life with its trademark ensemble work and bold staging, offering an honest look at the exhilaration and uncertainty of youth – and one magnificently embarrassing dad.
description: Performed by Kaleidoscope Theatre Company.Written by Chris Bush.Co-Directed by Betty Chequers & Robyn Nash.Produced by Deirdre Daly.This amateur production is presented by arrangement with Nick Hern Books.

reviews.reviewer: Lela Tredwell Late-night talk radio typically provides a place on the air waves
reviews.excerpt: Late-night talk radio typically provides a place on the air waves where softly-spoken conversations, lonely confessions, and mundane musings act as an antidote to the dark hours. In their new improvised show, Bird and Tax Collector aim to provide one such refuge for the insomniacs, the night owls and the shift workers. Despite it being mid-afternoon, devices at the start of the show help us grasp
